title: 80 is no age to fight in court, go for mediation: Supreme Court tells Rani Kapur in dispute with Priya Kapur
description: The Supreme Court on Monday nudged parties in the Rani Kapur–Priya Kapur dispute over the Sona Group family trust to explore mediation, observing that a prolonged inheritance battle involving an 80-year-old litigant would serve little purpose. (Rani Kapur Vs Priya Sachdeva Kapur)A Bench of Justices JB Pardiwala and Vijay Bishnoi told the lawyers, "Why are you all fighting? This is not the age for your client to fight…go for mediation once and for all, from A to Z. Otherwise, this is a waste.”Jus
